text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 56 

GAP_DAYS_INPP_3M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Preferred Pharmacy — days in 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 3-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an in-
network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy within a split network) during 
the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
